title: Designing a Recommendation Engine for E-commerce
scenario: Create a recommendation engine that recommends products to users based on their purchase history and browsing behavior. The system should be able to handle product variations and attributes. The input should be a user's purchase history and browsing behavior, and the output should be a list of recommended products with their corresponding similarity scores.
constraints: Must include a collaborative filtering algorithm
Must be under 250 lines of code
Must handle product variations and attributes

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the response includes a collaborative filtering algorithm
Check if the response includes a list of recommended products with similarity scores
Check if the response handles product variations and attributes correctly
Check if the response adheres to best practices for code quality and organization
